EnglishDescription: Hazrat Jibraeel (a) told the Holy Prophet (s) that whoever will recite this dua, Allah (s.w.t) will bestow upon him with 3 things (1) his sustenance (rozi) will increase (2) he will get sustenance from hidden sources (3) he will succeed in combat with infidels in war. By the power of this dua, he will be protected from sorcery and evil of satan…
RUrduDescription: Hazrat Jibraeel (a) ne Rasoole Khuda (s) se farmaya keh: Jo shakhs is dua ko padhega. Khuda wande Aalam Apni rehmat se uski rozi mein barkat dega. Ghaib se usko rozi pohnchayega. Jang ke maidaan mein woh ghaalib o mansoor rahega. Is dua ki barkat se Jaadu-Tona aur Shaitaan ke sharr se mahfooz rahega…
UrduDescription: حضرت جبرائیلؑ نے رسول خداؐ سے فرمایا کہ جو شخص اس دُعا کو پڑھےگا تو خداوند عالم اپنی رحمت سے اسکی روزی میں برکت اور غیب سے اس روزی عطا فرمائےگا۔ جنگ کے میدان میں وہ غالب اور منصور رہےگا۔ اس دُعا کی برکت سے جادو ٹونہ اور شیطان کے شر سے محفوظ رہےگا۔۔۔

English: In the Name of Allah, the most Gracious, the most Merciful.
RUrdu: (Shuru karta hu) Allah ke naam se Jo bada maher-baan nehaayat rahem karne waala hai.
Urdu: اللہ کے نام سے (شروع کرتا ہوں) جو بڑا مہربا ن نہایت رحم کرنے والا ہے۔
ArabicText1: بِسْمِ اللہِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِیْمِ

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Master, the Most Sanctified. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Most Powerful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Merciful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forgiving, the Merciful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Wise.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat baadshah aur muqaddas (taahir) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat dost rakhne waala aur zabardast hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat hamdard aur rahem karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bakhsh ne waala aur rahim hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat karam karne waala aur haakim hai.
Urdu: انشاء اللہ ترجمہ جلد آرہا ہے
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ الْقُدُّوْسِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيزِ الْجَبَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّؤُفِ الرَّحِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُوْرِ الرَّحِيمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَرِيْـمِ الْحَكِيْمِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Truthful (to His word). There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Gentle, the All-Knowing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Self-Sufficient, the One Who is Worshipped. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forgiving, the Loving. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ultimate Truster, the Supporter.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat taaqatwar aur wafadaar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat lutf karne waala aur khabar-daar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat be-neyaaz aur laayaqe parastish hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bakhsh ne waala aur chaha-ne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat wakaalat o kifaalat karne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَوِّيِّ الْوَفِيِّ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ اللَّطِيْفِ الْخَبِـيْرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّمَدِ الْمَعْبُوْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُوْرِ الْوَدُوْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوَكِيْلِ الْكَفِيْلِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Watcher, the Keeper. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Perpetual, the Upright. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One Who Gives Life, the One Who Causes to Die. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Living, the Self-Subsistent. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Maker.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat peechha karne aur hifaazat karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat hamesha qaayem rehne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat zindagi aur maut dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat hamesha zinda rehne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat paiyda karne aur neki karne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّقِيْبِ الْحَفِيْظِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الدَّائِمِ الْقٰائِمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُحْيِّ الْمُمِيْتِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَيِّ الْقَيُّوْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ الْبٰارِيِّ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Most High, the Incomparably Great. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One, the Single. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Granter of Security, the Protector. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Reckoner, the Witness. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Forbearing, the Generous.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat buland o baala aur ba-azmat hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat ek o tanha hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat amaan o sukoon dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat hisaab karne waala aur gawah hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bardasht karne aur karam karne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوٰاحِدِ الْأَحَدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُؤْمِنِ الْمُهَيْمِنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَسِيْبِ الشَّهِيْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَلِيْمِ الْكَرِيْـمِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the First, the Eternal. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the First, the Last. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Apparent, the Hidden. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Greatest, the Most High. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who Fulfills the Needs.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat awwal o qadeem hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat awwal o aakhir hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat zaahir o baatin (chhupa huwa) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bada aur buland martabe waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat haajato’n ko pura karne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْأَوَّلِ الْقَدِيْـمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْأَوَّلِ الْآخِرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الظّٰاهِرِ الْبٰاطِنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَبِيْرِ الْمُتَعٰالِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقٰاضِيِّ الْحٰاجٰاتِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Merciful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Great Throne. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to My Lord, the Most High. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ultimate Proof, the King. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat maher-baan aur rahem karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat Rabbul Arshil Azeem (arsh'e azeem ka paalne waala) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat mera buland martabe waala Parwardigaar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat aaleel dene (waazeh-bayaan) waala aur saheb-e saltanat hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat soonne aur dekhne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلٰى۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْبُرْهٰانِ السُّلْطٰانِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّمِيْعِ الْبَصِيْـرِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One, the Subduer. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing, the Wise. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer (of Sins), the Oft-Forgiving. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Merciful, the Devout. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Greatest, the Great.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat akela aur qa-her dhaane waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat sab kuchh jaanne waala aur hikmat waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat aiybo’n ko chhupaane waala aur bohot ziyadah maaf karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat maher-baan o deyaanat-daar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bada aur sabse buzurgh hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوٰاحِدِ الْقَهَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيْمِ الْحَكِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتَّارِ الْغَفّٰارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ الدَّيّٰانِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْكَبِيْـرِ الْأَكْبَرِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Aware, the All-Knowing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who Cures, the Sufficient. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Great, the Remaining. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Eternally Besought, the One. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Earth and the Heaven.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat jaanne waalo’n mein sabse ziyadah jaanne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat shifa dene waala aur kifaayat-kaar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat ba-azmat, baaqi rehne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat be-neyaaz aur ek-o-tanha hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat zameen o aasmaano ka Parwardigaar hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلِيْمِ العَلَّامِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الشّٰافِي الْكٰافِيْ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَظِيْمِ الْبٰاقِيْ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّمَدِ الْأَحَدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْأَرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator of the Created. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who has created the Night and the Day. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Continuous granter of Sustenance. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Opener, the All-Knowing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the All-Sufficient.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam makhluqaat ka Khaaliq hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat raat aur din ka paiyda karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat paiyda karne waala aur rizq dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat (rehmat ke darwaazo’n ka) kholne waala aur sab-kuchh jaanne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat dost rakhne waala aur daulat dene waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخَالِقِ الْمَخْلُوْقِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ مَنْ خَلَقَ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ الرَّزّٰاقِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْفَتَّاحِ الْعَلِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيْزِ الْغَنِيِّ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Oft-Forgiver, the Oft-Appreciative. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Great, the Forbearing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of the Dominion and the Heavens. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Respect and Greatness. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Grandeur and Power.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bakhsh ne waala aur shukr qabool karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat ba-azmat wa sab-kuchh jaanne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat saheb-e mulk o malakut (galaxy) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat izzat o azmat waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat badaayi waala aur zabardast hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَفُوْرِ الشَّكُوْرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَظِيْمِ الْعَلِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوْتِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْعِزَّةِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْهَيْبَةِ وَالْقُدْرَةِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Pride and Dignity. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer (of sins), the Great. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Knower of the Unseen. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Praised, the Exalted. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Wise, the Eternal.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat aiybo’n ka chhupaane waala aur azeem hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat ghaibo’n ka jaanne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat taarif karne waala aur izzat dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat qadeem hikmat waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat qudrat rakhne waala aur chhupaane waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْكِــبِرِيَاءِ وَ الْجَبَرُوْتِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتَّارِ الْعَظِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعٰالِمِ الْغَيْبِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَمِيْدِ وَ الْمَجِيْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَكِيْمِ الْقَدِيْـمِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Coverer (of sins). There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the all Sufficient, the Great. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing, the Peace. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the King, the Helper.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat sab kuchh soonne aur jaanne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat azeem daulat o sarwat dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat sab ka ilm rakhne waala aur aman ataa karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat madad karne waala baadshah hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat saheb-e sarwat o maher-baan hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقٰادِرِ السَّتَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّمِيْعِ الْعَلِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلَّامِ السَّلَامِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ النَّصِـيْـرِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Most Merciful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One whose Goodness is close at Hand. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Guardian of all Goodness. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Oft-Patient, the Coverer (of sins). There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Creator, the Divine Light.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat nazdik hai aur nekiya ataa karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat saahebe hasanaat hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat bohot sabr karne waala aur aiybo’n ko chhupaane waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak zaat Khaaliq’e Noor hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat daulat-mand aur saahebe ejaaz (karaamat waala) hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الرَّحْمٰنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَرِيْبِ الْحَسَنَاتِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْوَلِيِّ الْحَسَنَاتِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّبُوْرِ السَّتَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِقِ النُّوْرِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Miracle. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Erudite, the Oft-Thanked. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Sufficient, the Eternal. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Manifest Grandeur. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Uncontaminated and One Who (spiritually) Purifies Others.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat fazl o karam karne waala aur shukr qubool karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat daulat ataa karne waala aur qadeem hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak zaat khule (open) aur waaze (clear) jalaalat waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat mukhliso’n ka mukhlis hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat waade (promise) mein sachcha hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْمُعْجِزِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْفٰاضِلِ الشَّكُوْرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْغَنِيِّ الْقَدِيْـمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْجَلَالِ الْمُبِيْنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْخٰالِصِ الْمُخْلِصِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One who is Truthful to His Word. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Manifest Truth. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Even-Powered Strength. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Powerful, the Noble. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the All-Knowing of the Unseen.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat khula huwa haq hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat sab ko (uske zarurat ke mutabiq) rozi dene waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat taaqat-war aur har dil azeez hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat aisa zindah hai Jo kabhi nahi marega. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam ghaibo’n ka jaanne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الصَّادِقِ الْوَعْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَقِّ الْمُبِيْنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِيْنِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَوِيِّ الْعَزِيْزِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَلَّامِ الْغُيُوْبِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Living Who shall Never Die. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Coverer of Sins. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the One whose Help is Sought, the Forgiving. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Entire Universe. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Most Merciful, the Coverer (of sins).
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam aiybo’n ko chhupaane waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat talab-gaaro’n ko bakkshne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat saare jahan ka Paalne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat maher-baan aur chhupaane waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat rahem karne waala aur bakhsh ne waala hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَيِّ الَّذِيْ لَا يَمُوْتُ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ السَّتَّارِ الْعُيُوْبِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمُسْتَعَانِ الْغَفُوْرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْـنَ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحْمٰنِ السَّتَّارِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Forgiver. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Granter of Desires. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Able, the Powerful. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Forgiveness and the Most Forbearing. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ruler of the Kingdom.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat dost rakhne waala aur bohot ziyadah ataa karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat qaadir o saheb-e iqtedaar hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat maaf karne waala aur bardaasht karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam mulko’n (countries) ka maalik hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat behtareen musavvir (tasweer banana waala) hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الرَّحِيْمِ الْغَفَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيْزِ الْوَهَّابِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقَادِرِ الْمُقْتَدِرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْغُفْرٰانِ الْحَلِيْمِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمٰالِكِ الْمُلْكِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Evolver, the Fashioner. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Noble, the Haughty. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Haughty, the Proud. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to Allah for that which they ascribe to Him. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Sacred, the Oft-Praised.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat izzat waala aur zabardast hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat zabardast buland-martabe waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat jiski sabhi taarif o tausif karte hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat muqaddas aur laayaqe taarif o ehteraam hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam farishto’n aur saare rooho’n ka Parwardigaar hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْبَارِءِ الْمُصَوِّرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْعَزِيْزِ الْجَبَّارِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْجَبَّارِ الْمُتَكَبِّرِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ اللهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُوْنَ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْقُدُّوْسِ الْسُبُّوْحِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Lord of the Angels and the Spirit. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Possessor of Bounties and the Treasures. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Ruler of the Purpose. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Glory be to the Compassionate, the Benign. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Aadam the chosen of Allah.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat tamaam neymat o aasaaish ataa karne waala hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak-zaat baadshah hai jo sab ka manzile maqsud hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke, Woh paak zaat hannaan o mannaan (shafaqat waala aur ehsaan karne waala) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Aadam (a.s) Allah ke chuhninda (selected) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Nooh (a.s) Allah ke bachaaye huwe (najaat yaafta) hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ رَبِّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالرُّوْحِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ ذِي الْأَلَآءِ وَ النَّعَمَاءِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْمَلِكِ الْمَقْصُوْدِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ سُبْحٰانَ الْحَنَّانِ الْمَنَّانِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ آدَمُ صَفِيُّ اللهِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Nooh the Saved of Allah. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Ibrahim the Friend of Allah. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Ismaeel the Sacrificed of Allah. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Musa the one who spoke to Allah. There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Dawood the Successor of Allah (on His Earth). There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Isa the Spirit of Allah.
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Ibrahim (a.s) Allah ke Khalil (dost) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Ismaeel (a.s) Allah ke zabeeh (raahe Khuda mein zabah hone wale) hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Moosa (a.s) Allah ke kaleem hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Dawood (a.s) Allah ke Khalifa hai. Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Isa (a.s) Allah ki Rooh hai.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ نُوْحُ نَجِيُّ اللهِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ اِبْرٰاهِيْمُ خَلِيْلُ اللهِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ اِسْمَائِيْلُ ذَبِيْحُ اللهِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ مُوْسٰى كَلِيْمُ اللهِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ دَاوُدُ خَلِيْفَةُ اللهِ۔ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ عِيْسٰى رُوْحُ اللهِ۔

English: There is no creature or entity worthy of worship except for Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah and may the blessings of Allah be upon the best of His creations and the Light of His Divine Throne, the best of Prophets and those who were sent (to guide humanity), our beloved, our leader, our support, our intercessor and our master, Muhammad and upon his family and his select, distinguished companions. May Your mercy be upon them all O the Most Merciful of the Merciful Ones.”
RUrdu: Nahi hai koi Ma’bood siwaaye Allah ke. Hazrat Muhammad (s.a.w.a) Allah ke Rasool hai. Aur Allah ki taraf se salwaat o salaam ho uske behtareen makhluq aur uske arsh ka noor, ambiya o mursaleen mein sabse afzal, hamare habib o sardar, aur hamare sanad (certified) o shifa’at karne waale, hamare aaqa o maula Hazrat Muhammad Mustafa (s.a.w.a) aur unki Aal (a.s) aur tamaam as’haabe ba-wafa (sincere companions) par. Apni rehmat se nawaaz ay rahem karne waalo’n mein sabse ziyadah rahem karne waale.
ArabicText1: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ مُحَمَّدَ رَّسُوْلُ اللهِ وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلٰى خَيْرِ خَلْقِهٖ وَنُوْرِ عَرْشِهٖ اَفْضَلِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْمُرْسَلِيْنَ حَبِيْبِنَا وَسَيِّدِنَا وَسَنَدِنَا وَشَفِيْعِنَا وَمَوْلَانَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلٰى آلِهٖ وَاَصْحَابِهِ الْمُنْتَجَبِيْنَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَااَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْـنَ۔

English: Allah’s (s.w.t) choicest blessings be upon Mohammed and his holy progeny.
RUrdu: Parwardigaar Tu rehmat naazil farma Hazrat Muhammad (s.a.w.a) aur unki Aal (a.s) par.
Urdu: اے معبود! رحمت نازل فرما حضرت محمدؐ اور انکی آل ؑپر۔
RArabic: ALLAHUMMA SWALLE ALAA MUHAMMADIW WA AALE MUHAMMADIN
ArabicText1: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ۔
